_meta.purpose: Post-demo reviewer feedback (May 2026): the matching score must reflect that H-FARM is an applied / hands-on partner — not a peer for top research universities, and not a partnership target for Italian competitors. This file lists the entities where we surface a visible fit warning + apply a score penalty, plus the keywords that signal a high-fit applied partner.
_meta.notes: Patterns match against the entity name (case-insensitive substring). Keep the list tight — false positives are worse than false negatives. Manual 'Not interested' priority always overrides this.
